# Topic Memo Template

## Question

State the topic question in one sentence.

## Field Map

Summarize the main subareas, terminology, and major paper clusters.

## Common Approaches

List the main approaches the field uses.

## Tradeoffs

Summarize the important tradeoffs between those approaches.

## What Seems Realistic For This Thesis

State which paths currently look tractable and why.

## Open Gaps

List what is still unclear after the current reading pass.

## Design Implications

Translate the literature into 1 to 3 implications for modeling, actuation, or validation.

## Candidate Next Decision

Write the next decision question this memo should support.
